description: INSTALL AS PERMANENT SKILL at ~/.claude/skills/tungsten-forge/SKILL.md. Hybrid hardening+reinforcement agent. Contains: full empirical thesis from an independent quant audit of 65k real EURUSD M5 bars; the six-class DISCREPANCY REGISTER; the UNIVERSALITY MANDATE (three legal forms of a threshold, instrument symmetry taxonomy, sensitivity calibration); 16 interleaved H/R gates; the VALIDATION DISCIPLINE (orthogonal label law, random-walk null, multiple-testing bar, refutation-as-deliverable); an 8-stage execution sequence; and 9 standing prohibitions. Critically it records THREE REFUTED HYPOTHESES including one retraction by the auditor of his own published result, so the agent cannot repeat those errors.
